title: Decision: Cloudways Server Sizing and Deployment Topology
description:
Define the server topology for Cloudways deployments before provisioning. Two deployments are planned: staging and production.

## Decisions
- **Production**: AWS via Cloudways
- **Dev/Stage**: Reuse existing Digital Ocean server with a new application foundation
- Clone and update environment configuration documentation to be committed to the repository
acceptance_criteria: Production topology is defined using AWS on Cloudways
Dev/Stage topology reuses the existing Digital Ocean server
New application foundation is created on the Digital Ocean server
Environment configuration documentation is committed to the repository
implementation_notes: Part of V3 Architecture Planning. Separates production (AWS/Cloudways) from dev/stage (Digital Ocean/Cloudways) to optimize cost while maintaining environment isolation.
